examples: By mid-week some 582,000 gallons of dispersant had been sprayed since the emergency began.
Seafood samples are also chemically analyzed for hydrocarbons and the dispersant BP sprayed on the oil slick.
Nimbus is a quickly deployable system that can be flown to any part of the world and can carry up to 18 tonnes of dispersant.
Approximately 1.47 million gallons of total dispersant have been applied 972, 000 on the surface and 493, 000 subsea.
My understanding is that the dispersant is actually not used in several Western countries because of its toxicity.
